items.html: <form action="/Search/" method="post"><input type="text" name="SearchWords" size="20" maxlength="75" value=""><input type="submit" value="Go!"></form>
Standard X-Ray Table Pads.
Standard X-Ray Table Pads.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Standard X-Ray Table Pads.</font>
• Pads can be used for imaging tables or stretchers.
• Helps maintain complete control of the patient.
• 3 Covering options, Economy Vinyl, Upholstery Vinyl and "Techno-Tuff" Vinyl.
• Two brass eyelets in each end for hanging.
• Cleans easy with mild cleaner or germicide.
Table pads over 1¼" (32mm) thick for diagnostic imaging are NOT recommended.

2" Premium Radiolucent X-Ray Table Pads.
2" Premium Radiolucent X-Ray Table Pads.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">2" Premium Radiolucent X-Ray Table Pads.</font>

All premium table pads feature deluxe, completely sealed and sewn boxed corners for a high-quality finish. Table pads are radiolucent and offer easy cleaning between patients with any mild cleaner or germicide.
Comfortable and durable fabric over a premium foam interior
• Choose: reinforced vinyl or 4-way stretch comfort fabric.
• Premium boxed corners provide a superior finish and look.
• Available in two standard sizes designed for virtually any application.

table-duplicate-name.description: Tables should not have the same summary and caption

target-size.description: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space

td-headers-attr.description: Table cell headers attributes must refer to other <th> elements in the same table

th-has-data-cells.description: Table headers in a data table must refer to data cells

oobee-confusing-alt-text.description: Image alt text must not be vague or unhelpful.

oobee-accessible-label.description: Clickable elements must have accessible labels.

Standard X-Ray Table Pads.
Standard X-Ray Table Pads.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Standard X-Ray Table Pads.</font>
• Pads can be used for imaging tables or stretchers.
• Helps maintain complete control of the patient.
• 3 Covering options, Economy Vinyl, Upholstery Vinyl and "Techno-Tuff" Vinyl.
• Two brass eyelets in each end for hanging.
• Cleans easy with mild cleaner or germicide.
Table pads over 1¼" (32mm) thick for diagnostic imaging are NOT recommended.
